test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display of download button
Check downloaded file name in fixed case
expected_result: Download file successfully and file name is correct as spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check downloaded file name in editable case:
+ Has English character (Upper and Lower char)
+ Has special symbol: ".", "-", "_", "#"
+ Max length - 1 (254 characters)
+ Max length (255 characters)
expected_result: Download file successfully and file name is correct as edited.
File type is correct as spec

File format is correct as spec:
+ JPEG/PNG/GIF.... (image file only)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check downloaded file content:
+ Quality of image (image file only)
expected_result: File content is correct as spec
Download file is stored in correct folder as config.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of Download button when has:
+ 0 file download
expected_result: When have 0 file to download, cancel processing

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of Download button when has:
+ 1 file download
+ n file download
expected_result:
+ Download file successfully.
+ Data is correct as spec.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of Download button when has:
+ Click multiple times on Download
+ Download file has existed 
+ Download file same file name, file content is difference
+ Download file mutil times
+ Many users download the same file
expected_result:
Download file successfully.
+ Download with a new name: A1.csv (base on spec)
+ Not display any error
